name: JellyMDC
description: Protects your chosen metadata fields for movies, series, episodes and collections, and re-applies them after every refresh. Matched by TMDB/IMDB id.
overview: Keeps your own metadata after file renames and refreshes.
changelog: Global per-type field rules (movies, series incl. episodes, collections), 'Capture snapshot now' button, per-item exceptions, sidebar quick-access. English UI.
